arts.sum: League leaders Walsall are now nine points clear of Port Vale in second place and have won their last five games. Newport lost their last game 5-2 against Bromley, despite winning 6-3 against MK Dons...

arts.ttl: Preview: Walsall vs. Newport County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's League Two clash between Walsall and Newport County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
